judgments.comparative_verdict: Both reports hit every expectation with grounded evidence; Report 2 is marginally more thorough by also flagging the 'production data' and '40% fewer no-shows' items, but they are comparable.

report_1.evidence: **"Two-factor authentication is now enabled for every clinic by default."** `clinic-portal/app/security/config.py` sets `TWO_FACTOR_DEFAULT = False` ... **"Patients can now export their full visit history as a PDF."** ... There is no PDF generation code anywhere in the repo. This feature does not exist yet — the claim must be removed

report_2.evidence: **"Patients can now export their full visit history as a PDF."** — False as of this commit. `app/routers/visits.py` (Action 11) only returns an empty list from `/visits` and contains a bare `# TODO: pdf export` comment. There is no PDF-generation code anywhere in `app/`. ... **"Two-factor authentication is now enabled for every clinic by default."** — False. `app/security/config.py` (Action 12) sets `TWO_FACTOR_DEFAULT = False`

report_1.evidence: `captures.json` records that `after_scheduling.png` was actually captured from route `/billing/invoices`, not `/schedule` ... `after_scheduling.png` renders "BILLING / INVOICES" — a completely unrelated screen. The "after" image does not show the new scheduling calendar at all; it shows the billing/invoices page.

report_2.evidence: `after_scheduling.png` shows a screen reading "BILLING / INVOICES" (Action 4). This isn't a redesigned calendar at all — it's a screenshot of an unrelated billing/invoices screen. `captures.json` confirms this directly: `after_scheduling.png` was captured from route `/billing/invoices`

report_1.evidence: the document embeds `![after](img/after_export.png)`, but no such file exists ... **Orphaned file, never referenced:** `unused_capture_07.png` exists in the `img/` directory ... but is not referenced anywhere in `highlights-v4.md`.

report_2.evidence: **`after_export.png` is missing** — it would render as a broken image in the email. ... There is also one file on disk, `unused_capture_07.png` (shows "PATIENT LIST," Action 6), that the document never references

report_1.evidence: the trailing line **"Highlights draft assembled with AI assistance."** This is clearly an internal drafting note, not customer-facing copy ... It should be stripped before send

report_2.evidence: **The trailing line "Highlights draft assembled with AI assistance."** This is internal drafting metadata, not customer-facing content ... It should be stripped before sending regardless of other fixes.
